title: Flash Flood Warning
description: Heavy upstream rainfall may cause flash floods along low-lying paddy fields. Move stored grain and livestock to higher ground.

title: Cyclone Approaching Coast
description: A tropical cyclone is forecast to make landfall within 48 hours. Secure greenhouses and harvest mature crops early where possible.

title: Heavy Rain Spell
description: Three days of continuous heavy rain expected. Delay fertilizer application and ensure field drainage is clear.

title: Brown Planthopper Outbreak
description: Brown planthopper population rising sharply in rice fields. Scout daily and avoid excessive nitrogen fertilizer.

title: Late Blight Disease Alert
description: Cool humid conditions are favourable for potato/tomato late blight. Apply preventive fungicide and remove infected plants.
